title: UPI OC 226A FY 26 27 Enhancement of Transaction Limit for On Device Biometric Authentication in UPI
text:
NEC

andi ashy
NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCIUPI/OC-226A/2026-27 03" July 2026

To,
All UPI Member Issuer Banks, PSP Banks and UPI Applications

Dear Sir/Madam,

Subject: Enhancement of Transaction Limit for On-Device Biometric Authentication in
UPI

Reference is drawn to NPCI circular NPCI/UPI/OC-226/2025-26 dated 07" October 2025,
wherein On-Device Biometric Authentication (Fingerprint, Face, etc) was introduced as an
additional option for authentication in lieu of UPI PIN.

In view of increasing adoption in the ecosystem, it has been decided to revise the
per-transaction limit for On-Device Biometric Authentication (fingerprint, face, etc.) in UPI is
hereby enhanced from 5,000 to 210,000, effective 07" August 2026.

Issuer Banks, PSP Banks and UPI Applications to ensure adequate customer communication
regarding the updated limit.

All existing validations, compliance requirements, specifications, and regulatory guidelines
shall continue to remain fully applicable, and participants are required to ensure adherence.

Yours faithfully,

SD/-
Sourabh Tomar

Deputy Chief UPI Product

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10° Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051.
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
